examples.title: Docker Compose for Microservices
examples.description: Sample Docker Compose file for multi-service Agile deployment
examples.code:
version: '3.8'
services:
 web-app:
 build: ./web
 ports:
 - "3000:3000"
 depends_on:
 - api-service
 - database
 environment:
 - NODE_ENV=production

 api-service:
 build: ./api
 ports:
 - "8080:8080"
 depends_on:
 - database

 database:
 image: postgres:14
 volumes:
 - db-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data

volumes:
 db-data:
examples.explanation: This Docker Compose configuration shows how microservices can be defined and deployed together in an Agile environment

examples.title: Git Basic Commands for Agile Teams
examples.description: Essential Git commands used in daily Agile workflows
examples.code:
## Initialize repository
git init

## Clone existing repo
git clone <repo-url>

## Create feature branch
git checkout -b feature/user-login

## Check status
git status

## Add changes
git add .

## Commit changes
git commit -m "Add user login feature"

## Push to remote
git push origin feature/user-login

## Create pull request
git pull-request

## Merge after review
git checkout main
git merge feature/user-login
examples.explanation: These Git commands represent the standard workflow for feature development, code review, and merging in Agile teams
